textByHashes.7a3213a97c8c1ccdb676fb0f20361fbc1d9362fe: I don't know how much longer I can cope here.
textByHashes.85c3029f6b5207da7b2d08badc717270804c5189: No, strangely enough the people here don't seem to be affected. It's just the awful living conditions that is making people ill.
textByHashes.5b046c69533398b01b910227cea9fb5bfc123753: Me too, but that doesn't seem to be the case.
textByHashes.679ac8c2ade37468a344169e14bff3c4e9f19d8b: But I don't have time to retrain! The people here need me! Who will help them if I'm gone?
textByHashes.706906d054d498963daa2fb1d5ff9f78b91c1877: Well he may be king but he clearly doesn't have a clue about health. This could be disasterous for the city!
textByHashes.a113d0d29d852123012a714a8ac12c7888a47f8a: You knights aren't allowed in West Ardougne. You should leave.
textByHashes.29a697f3629ea2abc9a23434349bd5afb66d9361: I don't take orders from citizens. Now I have work to be doing.
textByHashes.d1fbcbf030cf559cfbd12d395d4bd71e261ffc15: Hello my dear, how are you feeling?
textByHashes.3ecdd8a47e35551be22659b836864a80264fd0f5: Well in that case I'd better get back to work. Take care.
